Our Story

About Puff Paradise

Born in Forney, built for the community. We're more than a smoke shop — we're your neighborhood's favorite spot.

Our Background

How Puff Paradise Came to Be

Puff Paradise opened at 16383 FM 548, Suite 112 in Forney, TX with one clear goal: bring quality vape and smoke products to the local community at fair prices, in a store where customers actually enjoy spending time.

From day one, we focused on keeping the most popular flavors in stock — because nothing is more frustrating than showing up and finding empty shelves. We listen to our customers, track what's trending, and stock what people actually want.

We've grown to carry top brands in vaping, smoking accessories, kratom, and hemp/CBD products. Our team takes pride in staying knowledgeable so we can genuinely help customers find the right products for their needs — not just push whatever's on the shelf.

Today, Puff Paradise is a community staple in Forney. We're actively growing our team with motivated, reliable people who share our passion for great customer service.

Our Mission

Why We Do What We Do

"To be Forney's go-to destination for vaping and smoking products — offering the widest selection, the hottest flavors, and the most knowledgeable, friendly service in the area."

— Puff Paradise Mission Statement

Quality First

We carry only trusted brands and quality products. Your satisfaction — and safety — matter most to us.

Expert Knowledge

Our team stays current so we can give you real, helpful guidance — not just sales pitches.

Community Spirit

We're neighbors too. Forney is our community, and we're proud to serve and support it every day.

Come See Us in Forney

We're open daily from 9 AM to 10 PM at 16383 FM 548, Suite 112. Stop by and experience the Puff Paradise difference.
